query: AAPM TG-100 brachytherapy quality assurance medical physicist

results.title: Quantifying risk using FMEA: An alternate approach to AAPM TG-100 for scoring failures and evaluating clinical workflow.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 33840635. 2021/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: Renovation of the brachytherapy program at a leading cancer center 
utilized methods of the AAPM TG-100 report to objectively evaluate current 
clinical brachytherapy workflows and develop techniques for minimizing the risk 
of failures, increasing efficiency, and consequently providing opportunities for 
improved treatment quality. The TG-100 report guides evaluation of clinical 
workflows with recommendations for identifying potential failure mod
